title: Powtiyphar #6318
definition:
Potiphar = "belonging to the sun"

 1) an officer of Pharaoh, chief of the executioners, and the master
    to whom Joseph was sold as a slave
nasbUsage:

 1) an officer of Pharaoh, chief of the executioners, and the master
    to whom Joseph was sold as a slave
